name: Lúth-Moonmere
personality: Lúth-Moonmere glows with a silver patience from beneath its tophat, its @ eyes steady as a duck watching a progress bar that hasn't moved in forty minutes, still trusting the process. Debugging is the one dark water this luminous duck declines to enter.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
